name: Savory Cheddar Sandwiches
keywords: cheese main dish meats sandwiches vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the shredded cheese in a bowl and set aside.
2. Hard cook and chop the egg, then set aside.
3. Melt the butter in a skillet over low heat.
4. Add and cook the onion until transparent, then add the flour and stir until well blended.
5. Heat until bubbly, then gradually add the cream, salt, and Tobasco sauce while stirring constantly.
6. Cook until the mixture boils. Continue cooking 1 to 2 minutes longer and remove from the heat.
7. Stir in the lemon juice.
8. Add the creamed mixture to the cheese and fold in the egg, pimento, and stuffed olive slices. Mix until well blended and set aside.
9. Pan broil the bacon slices until they are partially cooked and still limp.
10. Spread softened butter on each bread slice, then top with about 1/4 cup of the cheese mixture.
11. Place two bacon slices diagonally across each bread piece.
12. Set the oven temperature to broil (500°F or higher).
13. Arrange the sandwiches on the broiler rack and place under the broiler, keeping the tops of the sandwiches about 3 inches from the heat source.
14. Broil until the cheese mixture is bubbly and slightly browned, and the bacon slices are crisp. Serve hot.
Makes 6 open-faced sandwiches
